user.title: VoIP Engine Mode
user.description: Choose how the VoIP engine runs. **Local** starts the bundled engine binary on this machine. **Remote** connects to an engine running elsewhere.

network.title: Network Configuration
network.description: Configure network ports and NAT traversal. Ports have been auto-detected where possible.

certificates.title: TLS Certificate
certificates.description: WebRTC requires a secure context. Choose how TLS certificates are managed.

extensions.title: SIP Extensions
extensions.description:
Define initial SIP extensions. Enter one per line in the format:
`number, display name, password`

Example:
{extension_format}

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: The connection to the VoIP engine was lost. Please verify the engine host and port.

error.rtp_range_invalid: RTP end port must be greater than start port.
error.engine_unreachable: Cannot connect to the VoIP engine at the specified address.
error.cert_path_required: Certificate file path is required for manual mode.
error.key_path_required: Private key file path is required for manual mode.
error.acme_domain_required: Domain is required for ACME certificate mode.
error.acme_email_required: Email is required for ACME certificate mode.
error.extension_format_invalid: Invalid extension format. Use: number, name, password
error.no_extensions: At least one extension must be configured.
error.unsupported_codec: The selected codec is not supported.
error.recording_path_required: A recording path is required when recording is enabled.

init.title: HA VoIP Options
init.description: Adjust runtime settings for the VoIP integration.

make_call.name: Make Call
make_call.description: Initiate an outbound call from a VoIP extension.

target.name: Target
target.description: The phone number or SIP URI to call.

from_extension.name: From Extension
from_extension.description: The extension number to call from.

codec.name: Codec
codec.description: Preferred audio codec for this call.

auto_answer.name: Auto Answer
auto_answer.description: Automatically answer the call on the target device.

call_id.name: Call ID
call_id.description: The unique identifier of the call to hang up.

transfer.name: Transfer Call
transfer.description: Transfer an active call to another target.

call_id.name: Call ID
call_id.description: The unique identifier of the call to transfer.

target.name: Transfer Target
target.description: The extension or number to transfer the call to.

record_toggle.name: Toggle Recording
record_toggle.description: Start or stop recording an active call.

call_id.name: Call ID
call_id.description: The unique identifier of the call.

mute_toggle.name: Toggle Mute
mute_toggle.description: Mute or unmute the microphone on an active call.

call_id.name: Call ID
call_id.description: The unique identifier of the call.

send_dtmf.name: Send DTMF
send_dtmf.description: Send DTMF tones on an active call.

call_id.name: Call ID
call_id.description: The unique identifier of the call.

digits.name: Digits
digits.description: The DTMF digits to send (0-9, A-D, *, #).
